meta.title: Maths Flashcards – Definitions Part 2
meta.description: Interactive flashcards for key mathematical definitions and terminology (Part 2)
meta.author: Kharadi Enterprise

cards.question: What is a reflex angle?
cards.answer: An angle that measures more than 180 degrees but less than 360 degrees

cards.question: What is a full rotation?
cards.answer: An angle of exactly 360 degrees

cards.question: What are complementary angles?
cards.answer: Two angles whose sum is 90 degrees

cards.question: What are supplementary angles?
cards.answer: Two angles whose sum is 180 degrees

cards.question: What are vertically opposite angles?
cards.answer: Angles formed when two lines intersect, opposite each other and equal in measure

cards.question: What are corresponding angles?
cards.answer: Angles in matching positions when a transversal crosses parallel lines; they are equal

cards.question: What are alternate angles?
cards.answer: Angles formed on opposite sides of a transversal between parallel lines; they are equal

cards.question: What are co-interior angles?
cards.answer: Angles on the same side of a transversal between parallel lines; they add up to 180 degrees

cards.question: What is the sum of angles in a triangle?
cards.answer: 180 degrees

cards.question: What is the sum of angles in a quadrilateral?
cards.answer: 360 degrees

cards.question: What is the sum of exterior angles of any polygon?
cards.answer: 360 degrees

cards.question: What is the formula for the sum of interior angles of an n-sided polygon?
cards.answer: (n - 2) × 180 degrees

cards.question: What is an equilateral triangle?
cards.answer: A triangle with all three sides equal and all angles equal to 60 degrees

cards.question: What is an isosceles triangle?
cards.answer: A triangle with two equal sides and two equal angles

cards.question: What is a scalene triangle?
cards.answer: A triangle with all three sides of different lengths and all three angles different

cards.question: What is the Pythagoras theorem?
cards.answer: In a right-angled triangle, a² + b² = c², where c is the hypotenuse

cards.question: What is the circumference of a circle?
cards.answer: The distance around a circle, calculated as 2πr or πd

cards.question: What is the area of a circle?
cards.answer: π × r²

cards.question: What is the perimeter of a rectangle?
cards.answer: 2 × (length + width)

cards.question: What is the area of a rectangle?
cards.answer: length × width
